aws.philosophy: service primitivesをaccount/Region境界で組み合わせる
aws.boundary: Account / OU / Region / VPCとservice固有resource policy
aws.operations: CloudWatch・CloudTrail・Configとservice quota、Region展開を確認

azure.philosophy: Entra・ARM・Policyによるenterprise control planeへworkloadを統合する
azure.boundary: Entra tenant / Management Group / Subscription / Resource Group
azure.operations: Azure Monitor・Activity Log・PolicyとSKU/API version、subscription展開を確認

gcp.philosophy: project境界、global platform、managed data、SRE原則から設計する
gcp.boundary: Organization / Folder / Projectとzonal・regional・global resource scope
gcp.operations: Cloud Operations・Audit Logs・quotaとlaunch stage、model/API versionを確認

oci.philosophy: compartment governanceとdatabase-centered enterprise workloadを明示的に構成する
oci.boundary: Tenancy / Compartment / Region / Availability Domain / Fault Domain
oci.operations: Monitoring・Logging・Audit・Cloud GuardとDB version、shape、Region展開を確認

data.oci: Object Storage / Autonomous Database / MySQL HeatWave

network.gcp: VPC / Network Connectivity Center / Private Service Connect
